author: kevaundray
content: It would be the input and its serialization format, what gets executed, and the output and its serialization format

author: kevaundray
content: for the execution part, see here: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/8db6e2b2a984431b57152dea6365aba22062a0b6/src/ethereum/forks/amsterdam/stateless.py#L129

author: kevaundray
content:
Theres a PR open for adding in the rest here: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2362 plus some larger refactors

Once this is merged, we can make a release and have all of the current ethereum test vectors working for guest program
